# Track: Preference Selection & Discovery (TRK-007)

This track focuses on the "Hyper-Personalization" aspect of CityWhisper. Users will be able to select their interests (e.g., Art, History, Subculture) and the app will dynamically suggest and discover POIs that match these preferences.

## 📋 Track Context
- **[Specification](./spec.md):** Detailed requirements and success criteria.
- **[Implementation Plan](./plan.md):** Step-by-step roadmap for development.
